title: Terms and Conditions
description: Read the terms and conditions of using Minha Foundation website

sections.title: Conditions of Use:
paragraphs: By accessing and using the Minha Foundation website, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions.
We recommend reviewing these terms carefully before using any service, content, or features available on this website.

sections.title: Trademarks:
paragraphs: All logos, brand names, and visual identity elements displayed on this website are the property of Minha Foundation unless otherwise stated.
You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any trademarked material without prior written permission.

sections.title: Copyrights:
paragraphs: All text, graphics, design, and media on this website are protected by copyright laws.
Unauthorized copying, modification, or republication of website content is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: License And Site Access:
paragraphs: Minha Foundation grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use this website for personal and lawful purposes.
This license does not include resale, data mining, automated extraction, or any commercial use without explicit authorization.

sections.title: Content Submitted By Site Users:
paragraphs: If you submit forms, messages, or other content through this site, you confirm that the information is lawful, accurate, and does not violate third-party rights.
We reserve the right to remove or moderate submitted content that is inappropriate, misleading, or harmful.

sections.title: Refund Policy:
paragraphs: Donations and contributions are generally considered voluntary and non-refundable unless otherwise specified in a campaign policy.
If you believe a transaction occurred in error, please contact our support team for review.

sections.title: Applicable Law:
paragraphs: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the applicable laws and regulations of the relevant jurisdiction.
Any disputes arising from website use will be handled through lawful procedures under applicable legal authority.

sections.title: Changes In Policy:
paragraphs: Minha Foundation may update or revise these terms at any time to reflect legal, operational, or service changes.
Continued use of the website after such updates means you accept the revised Terms and Conditions.
